title: Ukrainian Hash with English Muffin Crust
description: A twist on the classic breakfast dish with a crispy English muffin crust and savory Ukrainian flavors.
instructions: 2. Cube the English muffin and toast until crispy.
3. In a pan, cook the hash until lightly browned.
4. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs until beaten.
6. Add the salt and pepper to taste.
7. Combine the cooked hash and onion mixture with the eggs.
8. Add the toasted English muffin cubes to the egg mixture.
9. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish.
10. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until set.
